title: RFC: remove hidden dumpbolt command?
body:
I just noticed this command for the first time during my work on https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6711?

It is hidden and not documented as I guess it is meant for debugging only? Do we still have a need for this? Podman removes boltdb support in 6.0 and we switch the blob info cache in c/image over to sqlite as well a while ago so I Assume there is no need for this anymore?

comments.body: Once netavark isn't using it any more, sure.

Yeah the libnetwork code still has boltdb, I know we talked a long time ago about ever moving that but it was never finished so I guess that might still stay around for a bit.
That said I am not sure we would need it for libnetwork though I guess you are right as long as we still have a boltdb dep shipping this in buildah has no real disadvantage so we can keep around until then
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
